visibility_limits.note: This workstation can run the lifecycle RPCs and verify public-table state through the live service-role API surface, but it cannot query cron.job, cron.job_run_details, or pg_inherits from here.

error.message: must be owner of table provider_offer_history_p20260502
canceling statement due to statement timeout

follow_up_issues.title: Provider-history retention drop RPC cannot drop partitions due to live ownership mismatch
follow_up_issues.observed_failure: drop_old_provider_offer_history_partitions(7) returns SQLSTATE 42501: must be owner of table provider_offer_history_p20260502
follow_up_issues.impact: The lifecycle cannot clear the merge_provider_offer_staging_cycle gate because the partition-drop phase fails on live.
follow_up_issues.next_action: Align ownership or SECURITY DEFINER semantics so the retention function can drop eligible provider_offer_history partitions in production.

follow_up_issues.title: Provider-offers bounded prune still times out under the required 7/5000/20 contract on live
follow_up_issues.observed_failure: prune_provider_offers_bounded(7,5000,20) returns SQLSTATE 57014: canceling statement due to statement timeout
follow_up_issues.impact: The lifecycle cannot clear the merge_provider_offer_staging_cycle gate because the prune phase does not complete on live.
follow_up_issues.next_action: Verify the live prune implementation and runtime timeout budget so the required batch contract completes without timeout.

follow_up_issues.title: UTV2-869 runtime observability deploy blocked by missing GitHub Actions secret
follow_up_issues.observed_failure: Deploy workflow run 25618823962 failed Deploy check because SUPABASE_URL was empty in GitHub Actions.
follow_up_issues.impact: UTV2-869 is pushed to origin/main but not deployed.
follow_up_issues.next_action: Populate or repair the GitHub Actions SUPABASE_URL secret, then re-run the Deploy workflow.

gate_recommendation.reason: The required live lifecycle does not pass end-to-end: summarize succeeds, but drop fails on ownership and prune fails on timeout.
